messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-439 needs your approval before it can proceed. Reply here with "approve BL-439" (or "reject BL-439 <reason>") to act.

messages.author: swarm
messages.text:
What it is: FES second-swarm bring-up runbook + E2E acceptance: a real mono-rotate swarm against free-email-scanner with proven Telegram separation and a distinct fleet identity
What it solves: PARKED behind BL-436 (per-swarm creds) + BL-437 (fleet status publish) — the separation and the
distinct-identity proofs both depend on those. Scenarios live in
specs/features/BL-439-fes-second-swarm-bringup.feature.draft until both land and this is promoted.
How it works: Following the runbook stands up the FES swarm as a mono-rotate pack (BL-448) with its own swarm_name from the Windows-side checkout

messages.author: swarm
messages.text: BL-439 - FES second-swarm bring-up runbook + E2E acceptance: a real mono-rotate swarm against free-email-scanner with proven Telegram separation and a distinct fleet identity is complete.
